name: Pickled Onions, New Orleans Style
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Tiny Yellow Onions (up to 1 inch in diameter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and place them in a glass or plastic container—avoid metal.
2. Mix the water and salt, then pour over the onions and let soak overnight.
3. The next day, take clean canning jars and sprinkle some of the red pepper, basil, and one bay leaf on the bottom.
4. Pack the onions to the 1/3 level, then repeat in layers until all jars are packed.
5. Mix the vinegar, water, crab boil, and food coloring (if desired) and pour over the onions.
6. Cap the jars and refrigerate for at least one week before using. If increasing the amount made, maintain a 3:1 ratio of vinegar to water.
7. Enjoy with red beans and rice!
